title: Apartments for Rent in Gordon Square, Cleveland
metaTitle: Gordon Square Apartments for Rent, Cleveland OH
metaDescription: Gordon Square apartments for rent in Cleveland's Detroit-Shoreway arts district (44102). Rent ranges, transit, and Section 8-friendly units. Book a showing.
answerBox: Gordon Square is the arts district along Detroit Avenue in Cleveland's Detroit-Shoreway neighborhood, ZIP 44102, on the near-west side. We work with a small number of Section 8-friendly rental units in and around Gordon Square, part of our broader west-side inventory, typically renting between about $700 and $1,800 a month.

sections.h2: Renting an apartment in Gordon Square
body: Gordon Square is the commercial and cultural strip along **Detroit Avenue** inside the larger Detroit-Shoreway neighborhood on Cleveland's near-west side, in **ZIP code 44102**. The district takes its name from the Gordon Square Arts District and includes the Capitol Theatre, Near West Theatre, and Cleveland Public Theatre alongside restaurants and small shops.

Much of the housing stock a block or two off Detroit Avenue is early-1900s duplexes converted into individual apartment-style units, rather than large apartment complexes. We work with a small number of Section 8-friendly rental units in this part of the city as part of our broader west-side selection — [book a free showing](/p/book-showing) to see what's currently available near Gordon Square.

sections.h2: What does it cost to rent an apartment near Gordon Square?
body: Citywide, per **Zumper's** rent report dated July 4, 2026, a 2-bedroom unit has a median asking rent around **$1,100/month** and a 3-bedroom around **$1,350**. Units in our own selection around Gordon Square and the wider Detroit-Shoreway/Cudell (44102) area generally fall within our overall Cleveland range of about **$700 to $1,800 a month**, with most closer to **$1,000**, depending on size and condition.

**RentCafe's (Yardi)** report dated July 2, 2026 puts the citywide average for professionally-managed apartment buildings at **$1,564/month** for 787 square feet — useful as an upper comparison point, since that figure reflects newer large complexes rather than the individually-owned duplex units more typical of the streets around Gordon Square.

rows: Our available homes near Gordon Square / 44102

body: Gordon Square sits directly on GCRTA's Detroit Avenue bus corridor, with regular service east toward downtown and west toward Lakewood. The West Shoreway (Route 2) is a short drive away, giving direct highway access along the Lake Erie shoreline, and Edgewater Park — part of the Cleveland Metroparks Lakefront system — sits about a mile north.

items: **Transit:** Detroit Avenue bus routes; West Shoreway (Route 2) nearby
**Arts district:** Capitol Theatre, Near West Theatre, Cleveland Public Theatre
**Green space:** Edgewater Park, about a mile north

sections.h2: Section 8 and vouchers in Gordon Square
body: Gordon Square falls within ZIP 44102, one of the areas where we currently work with rental homes, and every unit we work with accepts Housing Choice Vouchers (Section 8) and is HUD-inspection-ready. Ohio has no statewide law requiring landlords to accept vouchers, and Cleveland does not currently have a citywide source-of-income protection ordinance, so it's worth confirming acceptance with any other landlord in the area — our units accept them across the board.

See our [Section 8 housing guide](/section-8-housing-cleveland-oh/) for how CMHA's application, waitlist, and inspection process works, or [start an application](/apply) if you've already found a unit you like. CMHA's own [Housing Choice Voucher page](https://www.cmha.net/housing/applicants/housing_choice_vouchers.php) has current program details.

Gordon Square is the commercial core of the broader [Detroit-Shoreway](/cleveland-rentals/neighborhoods/houses-for-rent-detroit-shoreway-cleveland/) neighborhood, and [Edgewater](/cleveland-rentals/neighborhoods/houses-for-rent-edgewater-cleveland/) sits a short walk or drive north along the lakefront. If you're comparing house-style rentals rather than apartment-style units in this part of the west side, our [houses for rent near Gordon Square](/cleveland-rentals/neighborhoods/houses-for-rent-gordon-square-cleveland/) guide covers the same footprint from that angle, including a closer look at the residential streets just off Detroit Avenue.

Renters weighing Gordon Square against other west-side options can also check our [apartments for rent in Cleveland, OH](/apartments-for-rent-cleveland-oh/) pillar page, which lists rent ranges and availability across every neighborhood where we currently work with units.

faq.q: Are there Section 8 apartments in Gordon Square?
faq.a: Yes. Gordon Square is within ZIP 44102, where we currently work with rental units, and every unit we work with accepts Housing Choice Vouchers and is HUD-inspection-ready. Book a showing to see current availability in and around Gordon Square.

faq.q: How much does an apartment cost near Gordon Square?
faq.a: Citywide, comparable 2-bedroom units run about $1,100 a month and 3-bedrooms about $1,350, per Zumper's July 2026 data. Units in our own selection near Gordon Square typically rent from about $700 to $1,800, with most closer to $1,000.

faq.q: What neighborhood is Gordon Square in?
faq.a: Gordon Square is the arts and entertainment strip along Detroit Avenue inside the larger Detroit-Shoreway neighborhood, in ZIP code 44102 on Cleveland's near-west side.

faq.q: What kind of apartments are available near Gordon Square?
faq.a: Most housing off Detroit Avenue is early-1900s duplexes converted into individual apartment-style units rather than large complexes. Our own units in the area are part of this same older west-side housing stock.

faq.q: Is Gordon Square close to Edgewater Park?
faq.a: Yes, Edgewater Park is about a mile north of Gordon Square along Cleveland's Lake Erie shoreline, reachable by a short drive or bike ride.
